title: Oracle Procurement Cloud Training
description:
Oracle Procurement Cloud training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle Procurement Cloud training at your pace.

This Oracle Procurement Cloud training is designed for those who are new to PRC Cloud and need an overview of the solution's capabilities. Explore product overview and navigation, product features, and reporting capabilities.

After the completion of the training you will be able to
curriculum:
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Overview
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Requisitions and Receipts
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Purchase Orders
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Suppliers
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Supplier Portal
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Catalogs
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Negotiations and Sourcing Programs
Introduction to Oracle Procurement Cloud Purchase Agreements
Introduction to Oracle Supplier
